name: eter-antigravity-toolkit
description: Repo-local toolkit for running the Eter skill ecosystem professionally inside Antigravity and Codex-style agent environments.

interface.longDescription: Packages the Eter Antigravity operating workflow, skill routing rules, and creator tooling so agents can work against this repository with consistent context, validation, and plugin metadata.
defaultPrompt: Use Eter skills to implement this professionally.
Repair the local skills and validate them.
Create a repo-local plugin for this workflow.
